chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-693 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 06.12.2021 Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh. -.-.-. Since 19.10.2018 no one has pursued this criminal miscellaneous application. Today, also no one has appeared. No intimation is received. This application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with pending applications. Since 19.10.2018 applicant has not taken much interest to pursue this application even today he is called absent and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this application is dismissed in non-prosecution. Since 28.07.2020 no one has pursued this petition. Today, also no one has appeared. No intimation is received. This petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with pending application. This revision application was filed on 128.05.2021 since then no one has pursued it. Today, also no one has appeared. No intimation is received. Application is dismissed in non- prosecution along with pending application(s). no one has ever appeared in this case and even on the last date of hearing no one was in attendance and today same is the position which reflects lack of interest on the part of applicants to pursue this application, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Since filing of this application on 10.12.2018 no one has ever appeared in this case and even on the last date of hearing no one was in attendance and today same is the position which reflects lack of interest on the part of applicants to pursue this application, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application.

Since filing of this application on 10.12.2018 no one has ever appeared in this case and even on the last date of hearing no one was in attendance and today same is the position which reflects lack of interest on the part of applicants to pursue this application, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. This application was filed on 20.09.2021 challenging the order dated 05.08.2021 passed by Additional Sessions Judge-II Tando Muhammad Khan, whereby application of applicant for registration of FIR has been dismissed, but since then the applicant has not taken any interest to pursue this application even today he is called absent. Accordingly, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed applications. eived. Case diaries reflect that the petitioner has not taken much interest to pursue this petition and even on the last date he was absent. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non- prosecution. 5. After filing, this matter was taken up on two dates viz: 07.11.2014 and 20.02.2015 when nobody was present on behalf of the applicant, which is indicative of the fact that neither the applicant nor his counsel has any interest to pursue this matter. Today also none is present. There is no any intimation. Bail application is dismissed for non-prosecution. 6. Learned Assistant Attorney General-II for Pakistan at Hyderabad files a statement along with comments of respondent No.2, which are taken on record. No one is present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. 7. Since filing of this application on 10.12.2018 no one has ever appeared in this case and even on the last date of hearing no one was in attendance and today same is the position which reflects lack of interest on the part of applicants to pursue this application, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. 8.

Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. 7. Since filing of this application on 10.12.2018 no one has ever appeared in this case and even on the last date of hearing no one was in attendance and today same is the position which reflects lack of interest on the part of applicants to pursue this application, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. 8. This Revision Application was filed on 21.02.2017 since then learned Counsel for applicant has never appeared to proceed with this matter even for the purpose of issuing notice to the respondents. The case diary shows that on 13.03.2017 this petition was taken up when learned Counsel was absent and on his behalf some advocate had held brief. Today he is also absent and on his behalf Mr. Yaseen Laghari, Advocate, is holding brief but he has refused to proceed with the matter pleading lack of instructions. In view of above, this Revision Application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. This petition was filed on 22.06.2021 since then no one has pursued it. Today, also no one has appeared. No intimation is received. Petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. 1. None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider
